name: get_disk_basic_info
description: Get basic information about a Compute Engine disk, including its name, ID, description, creation timestamp, size, type, status, last attach timestamp, and last detach timestamp. Requires project, zone, and disk name as input.

parameters.description: Request message for getting disk basic info.

project.description: Required. Project ID for this request.

zone.description: Required. The zone of the disk.
